zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy de Bailleul於1010年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德貝爾爾時，他的父親Wydo de Bailleul24歲，母親Aimeria Emma de Montgomery25歲。他和Mabel d'Aloncon至少有1個兒子。他去世於1094年7月29日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy de Bailleul于1010年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德貝爾爾时，他的父亲Wydo de Bailleul24岁，母亲Aimeria Emma de Montgomery25岁。他和Mabel d'Aloncon至少有1个儿子。他去世于1094年7月29日在英国英格兰史洛普爾史福斯波利享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy de Bailleul was born in 1010, in Bailleul, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Wydo de Bailleul, was 24 and his mother, Aimeria Emma de Montgomery, was 25. He had at least 1 son with Mabel d'Aloncon. He died on 29 July 1094, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy de Bailleul est né en 1010, à Bailleul, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Wydo de Bailleul, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Aimeria Emma de Montgomery, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mabel d'Aloncon. Il est décédé le 29 juillet 1094, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy de Bailleul 1010 in Bailleul, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wydo de Bailleul 24 und seine Mutter Aimeria Emma de Montgomery 25. Er hatte mit Mabel d'Aloncon mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 29. Juli 1094 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Bailleul è nato il nel 1010 nel Bailleul, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Wydo de Bailleul, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Aimeria Emma de Montgomery, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mabel d'Aloncon. Morì il 29 luglio 1094, nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy de Bailleulが1010年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードベイレウルで生まれた時，父Wydo de Bailleulは24歳，母Aimeria Emma de Montgomeryは25歳であった。彼はMabel d'Alonconとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1094年7月29日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy de Bailleul(이)가 1010년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 베이레우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wydo de Bailleul(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Aimeria Emma de Montgomery(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Mabel d'Aloncon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1094년 7월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Bailleul nasceu em 1010, em Bailleul, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Wydo de Bailleul, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Aimeria Emma de Montgomery, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mabel d'Aloncon. Ele faleceu em 29 de julho de 1094, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy de Bailleul родился в 1010 г. в местности беиллеул, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Wydo de Bailleul было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Aimeria Emma de Montgomery, 25. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mabel d'Aloncon. Он умер 29 июля 1094 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy de Bailleul nació en 1010, en Bailleul, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Wydo de Bailleul, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Aimeria Emma de Montgomery, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mabel d'Aloncon. Murió el 29 de julio de 1094, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 84 años.
